title: E-Commerce Platform
description: Full-stack e-commerce solution built with React and Node.js. Features include user authentication, payment integration, and admin dashboard.

title: Analytics Dashboard
description: Interactive business intelligence dashboard with real-time data visualization. Built using D3.js and integrates with multiple data sources.

title: Task Management App
description: Cross-platform mobile application built with React Native. Features include task tracking, team collaboration, and push notifications.
